metadata.description: Official marketplace for build-loop — orchestrated 5-phase development loop with optional Learn phase

plugins.name: build-loop
plugins.description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. Bundles debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills + incident-memory MCP server. Bridges (debugger-bridge, logging-tracer-bridge) are escalation hops that target skills can use to delegate to the standalone claude-code-debugger supporting plugin for extended capability (cross-project memory, additional assessors). NavGator integration via cherry-pick bridge. Opus 4.7 orchestrator, Sonnet execution, Haiku pattern-matching.
